Module org.snmp4j.agent
Package org.snmp4j.agent.mo.snmp

Class TransportDomains

java.lang.Object
org.snmp4j.agent.mo.snmp.TransportDomains
public final class TransportDomains extends Object
The TransportDomains class defines constant OIDs for the various transport types defined by the INET-ADDRESS-MIB.
Version:
2.0
Author:
Frank Fock
